cases.notes: Specific Ukrainian message includes the remaining quantity 50 and no internal detail.
Message names the invalid supplier reference and gives a corrective instruction.
Message names the blocking material and its localized quality-hold state.
Message identifies the material and exact 14.00 kg shortage.
Zero stock produces a visible Ukrainian critical-state label independent of color.
Message names rating and states the accepted 0–5 range.

limitations: Scores were assigned in the implementation session and are not an independent eval-judge verdict.
Executable outputs and rubric structure are deterministic and covered by tests; qualitative scores must be replaced by a fresh-agent eval-suite run.
